Name: Referral Email
Description: The email of the person being referred.

Name: Referral First Name
Description: The first name of the person being referred.

Name: Referral Last Name
Description: The last name of the person being referred.

Name: Referral Phone #
Description: The phone # of the person being referred.

Name: Assigned Rep
Description: The rep the referral is assigned to.

Name: External Referral Payment
Description: The payment amount paid to the external referral partner.

Name: Created by user ID
Description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Object create date/time
Description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

Name: Object last modified date/time
Description: Most recent timestamp of any property update for this object. This includes HubSpot internal properties, which can be visible or hidden. This property is updated automatically.

Name: Merged record IDs
Description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Record ID
Description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Record source detail 1
Description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

Name: Record source detail 2
Description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

Name: Record source detail 3
Description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

Name: Record source
Description: How this record was created.

Name: Shared teams
Description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

Name: Shared users
Description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

Name: Updated by user ID
Description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Owner assigned date
Description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Owner
Description: The owner of the object.

Name: Owner's main team
Description: The main team of the record owner. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

Name: Internal Referral Payment
Description: The payment given to a team member for the referral.

Name: Involved Team Member
Description: Affiliated internal sales rep or team member from Alpha

Name: POS Software
Description: The POS software to be displayed to the referral.
Options: Aloha Essentials; Aloha Cloud; Focus; SpotOn; SkyTab; RPower; Winston; NX Restaurant; QSR Only; AirCharge; Other - Miscellaneous

Name: Referral Description
Description: The description of the restaurant being referred to Alpha.

Name: Vendor Referral
Description: The software vendor is also paying a referral for this deal.

Name: Referrer Email
Description: The email of the person who submitted the referral.

Name: Referrer First Name
Description: The first name of the person who submitted the referral.

Name: Referrer Last Name
Description: The last name of the person who submitted the referral.

Name: Referrer Phone #
Description: The phone # of the person who submitted the referral.

Name: Referrer Relationship
Description: The relationship of the person who submitted the referral.
Options: Alpha Team Member; Client; Partner; Personal Relationship
